sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25174" key="dialogistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαλογ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n25174.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for discourse</tr_>: <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ -κή</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the reasoning faculty,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1004d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
